allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Improve UI performance and fix cleanup bugs

- Fix N+1 queries in performance.py \(batch pre-fetch expert instances\)
- Add database-level pagination to market analysis page \(LIMIT/OFFSET\)
- Increase auto-refresh intervals from 30s to 60s across all tabs
- Replace full page reload on account filter change with soft navigation
- Smart status polling on analysis detail page \(check status, not full reload\)
- Cache expert options with 60s TTL \(shared across tabs and pages\)
- Cache account filter data with 60s TTL
- Fix auto-refresh not honoring filters \(remove stale caching logic\)
- Fix cleanup.py: ActivityLog.timestamp → created_at, activity_type → type
- Fix cleanup batch preview N+1: batch query for open transaction checks
- Add eager loading \(selectinload\) for cleanup preview relationships

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from ba2_trade_platform.modules.experts.PennyMomentumTrader.prompts import build_quick_filter_prompt; p = build_quick_filter_prompt\([{''''symbol'''':''''TEST'''',''''price'''':2.5,''''volume'''':5000000,''''market_cap'''':100000000,''''sector'''':''''Healthcare'''',''''industry'''':''''Biotechnology'''',''''exchange'''':''''NASDAQ'''',''''rvol'''':3.2,''''change_percent'''':12.5}], 15\); print\([l for l in p.split\(''''\\n''''\) if ''''TEST'''' in l][0]\)")
